name: Hidden Treasures
recipeIngredient: 48 Maraschino Cherries, well drained on paper towels
1 cup White melting chocolate, cut into small pieces
recipeInstructions:
Preparation Time: 60 Minutes Bake Time: 10 Minutes
1. Heat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Cream Butter Flavor Crisco, sugar, egg, milk, and vanilla in a large bowl at medium speed of an electric mixer until well blended.
3. Combine flour, baking powder, salt, and baking soda. Beat into the creamed mixture at low speed.
4. Press dough in a very thin layer around the well-drained cherries. Place 2 inches apart on an ungreased baking sheet.
5. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 10 minutes. Cool one minute on the baking sheet, then remove to a cooling rack and cool completely.
6. For Dipping Chocolate: Melt chocolate of choice and Butter Flavor Crisco on very low heat or at 50% power in a microwave. Stir until smooth.
7. Transfer chocolate to a glass measuring cup. Drop one cookie at a time into the chocolate, using a fork to turn as needed. Cover completely with chocolate. Lift the cookie out of the chocolate on the fork, allowing excess chocolate to drip off, and place on a wax paper-lined baking sheet.
8. Sprinkle chopped pecans over the white chocolate cookies and slivered white chocolate over the dark chocolate cookies while the chocolate is still wet. Chill in the refrigerator to set the chocolate.
Makes 4 dozen cookies
If the chocolate becomes too firm, reheat it on low heat until pliable.
